Headline: #50 Route Temporary Southbound Reroute near Clark/Catalpa
ShortDescription: Southbound 50 buses are temporarily rerouted via Clark, Bryn Mawr, Ashland and Foster: due to street blockage near Clark/Catalpa.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Southbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Clark, Bryn Mawr, Ashland, Foster and over regular route due to street blockage near Clark/Catalpa.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
